channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: PlayStation says 'GTA 6 plays best on PS5' and is giving fans a freebie if they pre-order on the PS Store
item.description: Rockstar Games has teamed up with Sony to offer Grand Theft Auto 6 fans a free month of GTA+ if they pre-order the game on PS5.

item.title: La Garmin Bounce 2, la montre connectée pensée pour les enfants, perd 100 € pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: Dévoilée l'an dernier, la Garmin Bounce 2 est une montre connectée pour enfant, qui prend notamment en charge les appels, l'envoi de SMS ou encore la localisation en temps réel. Pendant les soldes d'été, on peut la trouver affichée à 199,99 euros au lieu de 299,99 euros à la Fnac et chez Darty.

item.title: Google Home annonce la fin de certaines automatisations : faut-il s’inquiéter ?
item.description: Des utilisateurs de Google Home ont entendu leurs enceintes annoncer la fin des « actions et automatisations du téléphone ». Avant de paniquer pour vos routines, voici ce que ce message veut vraiment dire.

item.title: 87% of cybersecurity managers say quick compliance programs are actually increasing risk and making businesses less resilient
item.description: Security professionals are skeptical if the speed comes at the expense of actual business resilience.

item.title: GTA 6 pre-orders live — all the best links, price information, and tips as pre-orders go live at midnight local time
item.description: Pre-orders are real and finally coming

item.title: Google Home Speaker Review: Leading the Pack, Again
item.description: Google’s first new smart speaker in six years is here and once again leads its competitors—now with paywalled features.

item.title: Some of our favorite Switch 2 accessories are cheaper during Prime Day
item.description: The Switch 2’s price is set to increase by $50 on September 1st, starting at $499.99, so if you’re purchasing one before that (or you already own one), now’s a good time to also save on accessories while you can. Amazon’s Prime Day has delivered many great game deals, but some of the best sales […]

item.title: The Google Home Speaker sounds good and looks great — but it’s finicky
item.description: Right out of the box, the new Google Home Speaker passed a couple of important tests. Even with the volume at 100 percent and music blaring out of the speaker, it quickly ducked the audio and listened every time I said "Hey, Google." In fact, in two days of testing, the speaker's three microphones haven't […]

item.title: Google Home Speaker review: A modest update for the Gemini era
item.description: Google's new speaker is a modest update, but the question is whether Gemini is a good smart home assistant.

item.title: Quelle console choisir pour jouer à GTA 6 ?
item.description: L'arrivée de GTA 6 s'apprête à bousculer les habitudes des joueurs. Vous êtes à la recherche d'une nouvelle machine pour le titre de Rockstar ? Voici notre guide d'achat pour choisir la console adéquate pour jouer à GTA 6.

item.title: Comment activer le contrôle parental sur la PS5 ? Notre tutoriel
item.description: La PlayStation 5 propose un contrôle parental complet, mais il reste planqué dans les menus et personne ne pense à le configurer. Voici comment limiter le temps de jeu, filtrer les jeux par âge et bloquer les achats, étape par étape.

item.title: Xiaomi déstocke ses meilleurs produits lors du Prime Day : les 7 deals à retenir
item.description: C'est le coup d'envoi du Prime Day, et Xiaomi casse ses prix sur Amazon ! Téléphones, trotinettes ou accessoires connectés… les produit sont nombreux. Découvrez notre guide des offres Xiaomi incontournables.

item.title: Prime Day : Amazon casse aussi les prix des produits Apple (iPhone, Watch, AirPods…)
item.description: Top départ pour le Prime Day et Amazon en profite pour brader une grande partie de l'écosystème d'Apple (iPhone, Apple Watch, AirPods). C'est l'un des rares moments de l'année pour s'équiper chez la marque à la pomme (presque) sans se ruiner.

item.title: Cdiscount Mobile ajoute 50 euros en bon d’achat à son forfait 5G de 100 Go à moins de 10 €
item.description: Cdiscount Mobile propose pendant quelques jours seulement son forfait 100 Go en 5G à 9,99 euros par mois, sans engagement, avec en prime 50 euros en bon d'achat.

item.title: Qualcomm Buys Buzzy Chip Startup Modular for Nearly $4 Billion
item.description: Modular, one of the most promising chip software startups of the AI era, heads for a multibillion-dollar exit.

item.title: Slate Auto’s radically simple electric truck starts at $24,950
item.description: The Jeff Bezos-backed startup finally revealed more pricing details for its debut EV, including a $29,950 starting price for the SUV variant, and boosted the base range to 205 miles.

item.title: Velo de ville lance le Hub-e : un concurrent du Lundi 27 de Moustache avec le nouveau moteur Bosch
item.description: À l’occasion de son 60e anniversaire, Velo de Ville présente le HUB-e, un vélo électrique qui mise sur la légèreté et le confort avec l’intégration du nouveau moteur Bosch Hub Line.

item.title: My Family Loves Board Games—Here Are the 9 I'd Buy On Sale During Prime Day
item.description: Looking for family fun this summer? You need these WIRED-recommended Prime Day board game deals.

item.title: Wendy’s stock price today: WEN shares surge as the fast food burger chain reunites Potbelly’s dynamic duo
item.description: Investors appear to be elated by the hiring of another fast-casual restaurant executive. Is this the reversal of fortunes that Wendy’s has been waiting for? Many fast food chains have had a rough several years.

item.title: Jeu vidéo | Grand Theft Auto VI lance ses précommandes jeudi et vise des records
item.description: Treize années d’attente vont bientôt prendre fin : le jeu vidéo Grand Theft Auto VI, dernier opus de la saga du studio américain Rockstar Games, ouvre ses précommandes jeudi à minuit, en piste pour devenir le plus grand lancement d’un produit culturel de l’histoire.

item.title: Galaxy Watch 9 et Ultra 2 : les couleurs et modèles fuitent, sans Classic en 2026
item.description: Une fuite détaille les couleurs et les variantes de la Galaxy Watch 9 et de la Watch Ultra 2 avant l’Unpacked du 22 juillet. Si vous lorgnez la prochaine montre Samsung, voici à quoi vous attendre.

item.title: I was struggling in the summer heat until my gaming chair’s fans saved me — and with these Prime Day deals you too can sit in chilled bliss
item.description: Have you tried a gaming chair with in-built cooling? Because you absolutely should while these Prime Day deals are live.

item.title: 107 Prime Day Deals on Gear We Stand By, Up To 52% Off (2026)
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: La référence du rafraîchissement discret : le Rowenta Turbo Silence passe à 84,99 euros
item.description: La chaleur commence à s'installer et le Rowenta Turbo Silence tombe à pic. Ce ventilateur puissant et particulièrement discret s'affiche actuellement chez Amazon pour 84,99 euros au lieu de 99,99 euros.

item.title: The best Prime Day gaming laptop deals: Shop Acer, ASUS, and more starting at $1,099.99
item.description: We rounded up the best Prime Day gaming laptop deals, fully vetted for current-gen performance, verified discounts, and value.

item.title: Just starting a vinyl record collection? Don't ruin your music with a suitcase-style turntable! Get this entry-level option from Sony instead and give your vinyl some TLC
item.description: If I were to start my vinyl record journey again, this is the entry-level turntable I'd get for its connectivity features and upfront audio.

item.title: 'Organised crime operating like a tech startup': EvilToken PHaaS group ramp up AI-enabled attacks by 1,380% in 2026
item.description: AI is used for more than just scaling - it enabled personalization at an unprecedented level.

item.title: GTA 6 : Rockstar Games tente de tuer le jeu vidéo d’occasion
item.description: Le lancement de GTA 6 est particulièrement important pour le jeu vidéo au sens large. La politique commerciale choisie par Rockstar Games pourrait porter ses fruits et être suivie par les autres éditeurs. C'est l'une des attaques les plus frontales contre le marché physique, et donc contre l'occasion, depuis la tentative avortée de Microsoft sur la Xbox One. ...

item.title: I made a massive mistake when buying Red Dead Redemption 2 — Here's how to avoid the same trap with GTA 6
item.description: Don't make my mistake when buying Grand Theft Auto 6.

item.title: Pas de version disque pour GTA 6 ? L’indice très inquiétant sur le poids astronomique du jeu
item.description: GTA 6 n'aura pas droit à une version disque à sa sortie. Un indice sur le poids mirobolant du jeu ?

item.title: New Prime Day deal: The Apple MacBook Pro M5 his record-low price of $2,399.99 at Amazon
item.description: The Apple 2026 MacBook Pro with M5 Pro chip is $199 off at Amazon dropping from $2,599 to $2,399.99.

item.title: Apple et Disney : Bob Iger révèle les coulisses d’une fusion qui aurait pu tout changer
item.description: Bob Iger révèle que Disney et Apple ont discuté d'une fusion historique qui aurait pu transformer l'industrie. Pourtant, malgré l'intérêt manifeste de l'ancien patron de Disney, le géant de Cupertino n'a jamais donné suite.

item.title: 20+ trading card deals to shop on Prime Day: Save on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more
item.description: Shop the best Prime Day trading card deals on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more, including MTG's Avatar Beginner Box under market price.

item.title: Star Fox for Nintendo Switch 2 is a magnificent Hollywood take on a classic
item.description: 'Star Fox' for Switch 2 feels like a prelude to something bigger, but it also stands on its own as a nice refresh of an N64 gem.

item.title: With a Range Bump, the $25K Slate Is the Most Affordable EV Truck in the US
item.description: Launching with better specs than expected, the no-frills Bezos-backed electric pickup looks set to take on Ford’s Maverick—and be an EV truck you can afford and fix yourself.

item.title: Star Fox is the Switch 2’s most impressive visual showcase yet
item.description: The biggest Switch 2 exclusives so far have largely been about scale. Mario Kart World introduced a wide open continent to race across, Donkey Kong Bananza let you smash basically everything around you, and Pokopia brought an expansive Minecraft-style creative experience to the Pokémon universe. Star Fox is different. A remake of a Nintendo 64 […]

item.title: I drove the Slate Truck — there’s more to it than EV minimalism
item.description: With its new pickup, Slate Auto is making a simple bet: price matters more than almost anything else. The company announced today that the American-made electric truck will start at $24,950, placing it squarely in the mid-$20,000 price range it had originally promised and making it the least expensive pickup truck and EV available today. […]

item.title: The Slate Auto pickup truck starts at $24,950
item.description: We now know the price of Slate Auto's affordable American-made electric truck, almost a year after the company warned it wouldn't hit its initial "under $20,000" target price. The no-frills pickup starts at $24,950 - matching the revised mid-$20,000 price range it promised last year, after the Trump administration announced it was putting an end […]...

item.title: MacPaw brings its 'privacy-first' ClearVPN to the biggest screen in your house
item.description: MacPaw's ClearVPN has officially launched on Apple TV and Android TV, promising effortless privacy and global content access without the frustration of typing passwords on a remote control.

item.title: Star Fox isn’t the most exciting remake, but it’s still a fun time
item.description: Star Fox is an enjoyable remake given its strong foundations, but it’s undeniably short and lacking in new content.

item.title: US government reportedly urging Meta to share its AI models
item.description: The US government is reportedly asking Meta to share its AI models for review, in the midst of growing security and safety concerns over the technology.

item.title: Close the gap in pediatric genomic care
item.description: Coverage is not access. We are at an inflection point in pediatric healthcare. Across the U.S., health plans are increasingly recognizing the clinical and economic value of genomic testing. Policies are expanding. Coverage is improving. For families navigating complex, often unexplained conditions, that progress matters.

item.title: How mindfulness became my secret weapon as a CEO
item.description: Why the most effective leaders work on their inner state as hard as their strategy Mindfulness used to mean a few minutes of breathing at the end of a yoga class and maybe the occasional attempt at meditation.

item.title: AI can help governments see around corners
item.description: Gathering and analyzing qualitative data can help agencies prevent crises. Government agencies at all levels are searching for the answer to one question: What can AI do for me today? An underused AI application is to generate leading indicators of issues on the horizon, empowering agency leaders to get ahead of challenges before they become full-blown crises....

item.title: Boys on the internet are telling me nicotine is a productivity hack
item.description: Traditionally, nicotine’s whole brand was “this will ruin your life but make you look hot outside a bar.” Now boys on the internet are telling me nicotine is a productivity hack.

item.title: The Acer Aspire 14 AI laptop is under $500 for Prime Day — act fast to score this rare deal
item.description: The Acer Aspire 14 AI laptop is down to $479.99 at Amazon, saving you $103 on a laptop with 16GB RAM and 512GB storage.

item.title: L’iPhone 15 se pare d’or pour 150 euros de moins pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: L'iPhone 15 doit désormais être comparé aux smartphones d'entrée de gamme de la marque à la pomme, une idée renforcée par son nouveau prix de 699 euros chez Darty.

item.title: 45+ of the best Prime Day tech deals, according to a tech editor on a budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: J’ai dormi au frais dans ma voiture électrique pendant la canicule pour 1 € la nuit, et je n’ai pas honte
item.description: Quatre nuits de canicule, une maison qui ne refroidit plus et une Model Y dans le garage. Pendant que la France battait son record de nuit la plus chaude, j'ai dormi dans ma voiture pour environ 1 € la nuit. Et non, je n'ai pas honte.

item.title: Stop squinting — score the best Samsung gaming monitor deals on Prime Day
item.description: Samsung gaming monitors are available with discounts of hundreds of dollars for Amazon Prime Day

item.title: Rockstar finally reveals pricing for Grand Theft Auto 6
item.description: Grand Theft Auto 6 will cost $80 when pre-orders open on June 25th at midnight.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 75+ deals on Apple, Sony, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals of 2026 on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: ‘A nightmare for repairability’: Early Google Home Speaker unboxing reveals design choice that many users won't be happy with
item.description: According to an early look at the new Google Home Speaker, there's a controversial choice regarding the power cable.

item.title: The Dyson PencilWash is down to its lowest price ever for Prime Day
item.description: Dyson’s PencilWash cordless hard floor cleaner is on sale for $199.99 ($150 off) at Amazon. This is the lowest price yet for the powered wet mop that’s a cousin to the silly-sounding-but-awesome Dyson PencilVac Fluffycones vacuum. The PencilWash basically takes the sleek styling and design of the PencilVac and simplifies it into a single-purpose electric […]...

item.title: I'm a trained barista, and these are the top 5 Nespresso machines I'd recommend to anyone — all with Prime Day savings
item.description: Making great espresso doesn't have to be a hassle — I've hand-picked my five top Nespresso machines, all of which are going cheap for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Best Buy's rival Prime Day sale is slashing best-selling Fitbits — shop my favorite top-rated models from $79.95
item.description: Best Buy's rival Prime Day sale is slashing prices on top-rated Fitbit models, and I'm rounding up the best deals on activity trackers and smartwatches, from $79.99.

item.title: Prime Day laptop deals are actually really good — shop MacBooks, Windows PCs, and gaming laptops
item.description: The best Prime Day laptop deals (so far) have gone to the Apple MacBook Air and the Microsoft Surface Laptop 7.

item.title: We're Tracking Prime Day Live To Find Sales Worth Shopping in 2026
item.description: Prime Day is still rolling, and so is our live blog. We'll bring you deals, trends, and commentary during the second day of Amazon's annual summer sale.

item.title: Boulanger solde une config très musclée : -36% sur un laptop avec dalle OLED, RTX 5070, Core Ultra 9 pour geeker sous canicule
item.description: Boulanger frappe fort pour les Soldes avec un PC portable HP Omen 16 suréquipé en promo à 1 339,98 euros au lieu de 2 199,99 euros.

item.title: 60 millions d'étoiles : voici la photo la plus grande et la plus détaillée jamais prise du centre de la Voie lactée !
item.description: À l’occasion du Quick Release 2 de la mission Euclid, l’Agence spatiale européenne a dévoilé aujourd’hui une nouvelle image du bulbe galactique, la région centrale de notre Galaxie. Cette image, qui allie champ large et haute résolution comme jamais auparavant, a été réalisée à partir des...

item.title: The ultimate Prime Day Apple deals guide: Were tracking prices on AirPods, MacBooks, and iPads
item.description: The best Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on the AirPods Max 2, the Apple Watch Series 11, and the M3 MacBook Air.

item.title: GTA 6 physical copies have a download code in the box and fans aren't happy — 'The biggest game to ever launch and that’s all the effort you’re putting in for physical?'
item.description: Physical copies of Grand Theft Auto 6 won't include a disc; instead, they'll come with a download code, and some fans aren't too happy.
